title: Organic Foods: Majority Are Still Ultra Processed
description: Expository visualization of the proportion of organic foods that are classified as ultra processed. Data is sourced from the Open Food Facts database and the NOVA classification system.

title: SoCalGuessr Neural Network Predictive Model
description: A convolutional neural network model using PyTorch predicting a specific city in Southern California achieving ~91% test accuracy. This model is fine-tuned from a pre-trained ResNet-18 model.

title: Rent and Public Transportation Proximity Analysis in San Diego
description: Exploratory data analysis of the relationship between rent prices of a residence and its proximity to public transportation.

title: League of Legends Analysis
description: An exploratory data analysis based on 100000 rows of League of Legends match data. Analysis includes missingness dependency, bivariate analyses, engineering features, designing a predictive model, and conducting model fairness tests.
